To implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt, we need to create a simple    
version control system. This will involve basic commands such as init, add, and 
commit. Below is the implementation of these commands in Go.                    

main.go                                                                         

                                                                                
@@ -0,0 +1,48 @@                                                                
+package main                                                                   
+                                                                               
+import (                                                                       
+   "fmt"                                                                       
+   "os"                                                                        
+)                                                                              
+                                                                               
+func initRepo() {                                                              
+   fmt.Println("Initialized empty minigit repository.")                        
+}                                                                              
+                                                                               
+func addFile(filename string) {                                                
+   fmt.Printf("Added file: %s\n", filename)                                    
+}                                                                              
+                                                                               
+func commit(message string) {                                                  
+   fmt.Printf("Committed with message: %s\n", message)                         
+}                                                                              
+                                                                               
+func main() {                                                                  
+   if len(os.Args) < 2 {                                                       
+       fmt.Println("Usage: minigit <command> [args]")                          
+       os.Exit(1)                                                              
+   }                                                                           
+                                                                               
+   command := os.Args[1]                                                       
+   args := os.Args[2:]                                                         
+                                                                               
+   switch command {                                                            
+   case "init":                                                                
+       initRepo()                                                              
+   case "add":                                                                 
+       if len(args) == 0 {                                                     
+           fmt.Println("Error: No file specified for add.")                    
+           os.Exit(1)                                                          
+       }                                                                       
+       addFile(args[0])                                                        
+   case "commit":                                                              
+       if len(args) == 0 {                                                     
+           fmt.Println("Error: No commit message provided.")                   
+           os.Exit(1)                                                          
+       }                                                                       
+       commit(args[0])                                                         
+   default:                                                                    
+       fmt.Printf("Unknown command: %s\n", command)                            
+       os.Exit(1)                                                              
+   }                                                                           
+}                                                                              
                                                                                

Makefile                                                                        

                                                                                
minigit: main.go                                                                
                                                                                
    go build -o minigit                                                         
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
clean:                                                                          
                                                                                
    rm -f minigit
